description: The FileSystemItem component is a type of BrowserItem used for system files or inventory items being viewed on the dash menu.

fields.Browser: The source browser this item came from.
fields.SelectedColor: The color this item's background should be when selected.
fields.SelectedText: The color this item's text should be when selected.
fields.NormalColor: The color this item's background should be at rest state
fields.NormalText: The color this item's text would be at rest state.
fields.Name: The name of the
fields.BasePath: The base directory of the item.
fields.Type: Whether if this is a file or folder.

usage: Used internally by the inventory and file system menus. Not used by the user.
